fields.description: Enable or disable CAPS enforcement globally. When disabled, all capability checks return True.
fields.label: Enable CAPS

fields.description: When enabled, CAPS resolution details are logged to the Error Log for debugging.
fields.label: Debug Mode

fields.description: Current CAPS map version (auto-incremented on Field/Action map changes).
fields.label: CAPS Version

fields.description: TTL (in seconds) for per-user capability cache in Redis. Default: 300s (5 min).
fields.label: User Cache TTL (seconds)

fields.description: TTL (in seconds) for field/action map cache in Redis. Default: 600s (10 min).
fields.label: Field/Action Map Cache TTL (seconds)

fields.description: Number of days to retain CAPS Audit Logs. Logs older than this are deleted by the daily cleanup task.
fields.label: Audit Log Retention (days)

fields.description: Enable logging of capability checks, grants, and revocations to the CAPS Audit Log.
fields.label: Enable Audit Logging

fields.description: When enabled, Administrator always gets all active capabilities (bypass CAPS).
fields.label: Administrator Bypass

fields.description: When enabled, Guest users always resolve to an empty capability set.
fields.label: Guest Empty Set

fields.description: Number of days before a time-boxed capability expires to send a warning notification. Set to 0 to disable.
fields.label: Expiry Warning (days)

fields.description: Send system notifications to users when their time-boxed capabilities are about to expire.
fields.label: Enable Expiry Notifications

fields.description: Allow CAPS Managers to delegate capabilities they hold (marked as delegatable) to other users.
fields.label: Enable Delegation

fields.description: Require a reason when delegating capabilities.
fields.label: Require Delegation Reason

fields.description: Notify users in-app and via realtime push when their capabilities are granted or revoked.
fields.label: Notify on Capability Change

fields.description: Send email to CAPS Admins when a new capability request is submitted.
fields.label: Email on Request Submission

fields.description: Send a weekly summary email to CAPS Admins with request stats and expiring grants.
fields.label: Enable Admin Digest

fields.description: When enabled, members of child groups inherit capabilities from ancestor groups.
fields.label: Enable Group Hierarchy
